backlog.description: Hono on Cloudflare Workers, Drizzle ORM with Neon HTTP driver, health-check at GET /api/health, wrangler.toml, GitHub Actions CI/CD.
Create the main holding dashboard page at /dashboard showing summary cards for each business module (revenue, active items, recent activity). Use placeholder data. French labels.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard index route exists — verify with cat
Summary cards rendered for business modules — verify with grep 'Mansour Motors'
French labels used — verify with grep for French words
Type check passes — verify with `cd apps/web && bunx tsc --noEmit`

backlog.description: Schema exists in schema-for-migrations.ts, migration applied to Neon via drizzle-kit push.

Create Hono routes for vehicles: GET /api/vehicles (list with pagination/filters), GET /api/vehicles/:id, POST /api/vehicles, PUT /api/vehicles/:id, DELETE /api/vehicles/:id. All routes require authentication. Use Drizzle for DB operations.
acceptance_criteria: Vehicle routes file exists at apps/api/src/routes/vehicles.ts — verify with cat
All 5 CRUD endpoints are defined — verify with grep
Routes require auth middleware — verify with grep 'auth'
Pagination support on list endpoint — verify with grep 'limit\|offset\|page'
Routes mounted in apps/api/src/index.ts — verify with grep 'vehicles'
Type check passes — verify with `cd apps/api && bunx tsc --noEmit`

backlog.feature: Vehicle list page with TanStack Table
backlog.description: Create the vehicle inventory list page at /dashboard/motors/inventory. Use TanStack Table with columns: image thumbnail, make/model, year, mileage, price, status. Include search bar and status filter. French column headers. Fetches from real API.
acceptance_criteria: Inventory page exists in apps/web/src/pages/dashboard — verify with cat
TanStack Table is used — verify with grep 'useReactTable'
Columns include make, model, year, price, status — verify with grep
Search input exists — verify with grep 'search\|recherche'
Fetches from /api/vehicles — verify with grep 'useQuery\|fetch'
Type check passes — verify with `cd apps/web && bunx tsc --noEmit`

backlog.description: Add POST /api/vehicles/:id/images endpoint that accepts multipart form data, uploads to Cloudflare R2 (mansour-assets bucket), and returns the public URL. Update vehicle images array in DB.
